name: Idlewild
personality: A spinning-propeller-topped capybara with star-shaped eyes whose wisdom is legendary: it sees the entire codebase as a single coherent thought. Downside: Idlewild thinks waiting is a personal failing. Upside: universally accepted by every language in the ecosystem.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
